message:
perf(hook): Optimize urlencoding_encode to avoid allocations

Replace per-character format!() calls with direct byte-based hex table lookups:
- Process input as bytes instead of chars for simpler encoding
- Use const HEX_DIGITS lookup table instead of runtime format!()
- Eliminate intermediate String allocation from c.to_string()
- Reduces allocations from O(n) to O(1) for URL encoding operations

The optimization benefits hook callbacks that encode query parameters,
particularly when processing many build results in succession.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
